title: Vesicle and reaction-diffusion hybrid modeling with STEPS
author: Hepburn, Iain
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction:
This repository, a snapshot from Github public repository  https://github.com/CNS-OIST/STEPS_Validation/vesicles , contains all data and modeling scripts to reproduce the data presented in:  
 Iain Hepburn, Jules Lallouette, Weiliang Chen, Andrew R. Gallimore, Sarah Y. Nagasawa-Soeda, Erik De Schutter (
Vesicle and reaction-diffusion hybrid modeling with STEPS. Communications Biology 7(1):
